mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
role = 1
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, username, email, nickname, avatar, phone, create_time FROM user
role = 1
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time ${sortOrder} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user WHERE id = #{userId} AND role = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(username, password, email, nickname, avatar, role, phone, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
INSERT INTO category(name, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{name}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, create_time, update_time FROM category WHERE name IN
#{name}
SELECT id, title, difficulty, description, input_format, output_format, sample_input, sample_output, time_limit, memory_limit, pass_rate, create_time, update_time FROM problem WHERE id = #{problemId}
SELECT c.name FROM category c JOIN problem_category pc ON c.id = pc.category_id WHERE pc.problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY c.id
SELECT id, problem_id, input_url, output_url, create_time, update_time FROM problem_test_case WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem(title, difficulty, description, input_format, output_format, sample_input, sample_output, time_limit, memory_limit, pass_rate, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{title}, #{difficulty}, #{description}, #{inputFormat}, #{outputFormat}, #{sampleInput}, #{sampleOutput}, #{timeLimit}, #{memoryLimit}, #{passRate}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE problem SET title = #{title}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, description = #{description}, input_format = #{inputFormat}, output_format = #{outputFormat}, sample_input = #{sampleInput}, sample_output = #{sampleOutput}, time_limit = #{timeLimit}, memory_limit = #{memoryLimit}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem_category(problem_id, category_id, create_time) VALUES(#{problemId}, #{categoryId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM evaluation WHERE submission_id IN (SELECT id FROM submission WHERE problem_id = #{problemId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem_test_case(problem_id, input_url, output_url, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{problemId}, #{inputUrl}, #{outputUrl}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO solution(problem_id, title, content, language, code, create_user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{problemId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{language}, #{code}, #{createUserId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE solution SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, language = #{language}, code = #{code}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
